context_values.response.implement:
Implemented `tui:shell` Slice 1 in [events.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/crates/myosu-tui/src/events.rs:62). `EventLoop::new()` now delegates to an internal stream-injectable constructor, and the ignored TTY-dependent tests were replaced with a headless `MockEventStream` harness that proves tick, key, resize, and async update delivery without a real terminal ([events.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/crates/myosu-tui/src/events.rs:66), [events.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/crates/myosu-tui/src/events.rs:154), [events.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/crates/myosu-tui/src/events.rs:183)).

I added the implement-stage curated artifacts at [implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/implementation.md:1), [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/verification.md:1), and [integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/integration.md:1). `quality.md` and `promotion.md` were intentionally not authored because the lane instructions assign them to later stages. Verification passed with `env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo test -p myosu-tui events:: -- --include-ignored` and all 4 `events::` tests green; I also documented in [verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM77EQZAB3EH21TY8VTT8988/worktree/outputs/tui/shell/verification.md:3) that the spec’s `cargo test events:: --no-ignore` string is invalid Cargo syntax. The next approved slice is the `shell.rs` Lobby-to-Game integration test.
